name: research-assistant
description: Multi-agent research orchestrator with parallel web research agents, internal recon, and prose-first synthesis. Supports 12 research types: competitive analysis, industry trends, market sizing, analog mapping, build/buy/partner, company deep dives, company financials, technology landscape, regulatory landscape, due diligence, person profiles, and ecosystem mapping. Each type has structured frameworks that produce opinionated, decision-ready output. Supports multiple company contexts.
